reasoning: Emeka Egbuka is an official finalist for the 2025 AP Offensive Rookie of the Year (alongside Tetairoa McMillan, Jaxson Dart, TreVeyon Henderson, and Tyler Shough), but his chances of winning are extremely low. Egbuka had a strong first half of the season when he was the odds-on favorite, but Carolina Panthers WR Tetairoa McMillan eventually overtook him by leading all rookies in receiving yards. Entering Week 18, McMillan was the heavy favorite at -210 while Egbuka had fallen to +3000. Additionally, McMillan already won the PFWA Offensive Rookie of the Year and received 90% of first-place votes in an insider mock poll (the other vote going to Shough). With the Jan 22 Polymarket price at exactly 2%, maintaining this estimate is strongly supported by all available evidence.
